description: The session module contains commands and events for monitoring the status of the remote end.

types.description: A unique identifier for a subscription.
A type that represents the behavior of the user prompt handler.

commands.name: subscribe
commands.description: Subscribes to events from the remote end.

parameters.name: events
parameters.description: The list of events to subscribe to.

parameters.name: contexts
parameters.description: Browsing contexts to subscribe to. To be implemented in https://webkit.org/b/282981

parameters.name: userContexts
parameters.description: User contexts to subscribe to. To be implemented in https://webkit.org/b/309502

returns.name: subscription
returns.description: A unique identifier for the subscription.

commands.name: unsubscribe
commands.description: Unsubscribes from events from the remote end.

parameters.name: subscriptions
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the subscription.

parameters.name: events
parameters.description: The list of fully qualified domain.eventNames to unsubscribe from.
